title: Guidance, Navigation & Control
shortSummary: How rockets know where they are and where to go — inertial navigation, guidance algorithms, and the control systems that land boosters on droneships.
whyItMatters: GNC is the brain of the rocket. SpaceX's ability to land Falcon 9 boosters on a floating droneship is a triumph of guidance and control engineering. From launch to orbit insertion to precision landing, GNC systems make autonomous flight possible.
